Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class MessagingDeliveryError

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.MessagingDeliveryError
public class MessagingDeliveryError extends SObject

Java class for MessagingDeliveryError complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="MessagingDeliveryError">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="CorrelationIdentifier" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DestinationPhoneNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FailureReason" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FlowEntity" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FullMessage" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MessagingChannel" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}MessagingChannel" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MessagingChannelId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MessagingEndUser" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}MessagingEndUser" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MessagingEndUserId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MessagingTemplate" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}MessagingTemplate" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MessagingTemplateId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Type" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserRecordAccess" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}UserRecordAccess" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
